note: Reviewed image-quality risk baseline. New entries mean a crop needs manual PDF/Techcerti review before shipping.

rules.smallEdgeTouch: PNG content touches an edge in an image no larger than 240x240.
rules.wideSparseCrop: Wide strip image has a very small non-white bounding box.
rules.largeSparseCrop: Large image has an extremely small non-white bounding box.
